About

Building AI that works
beyond the demo

I build multi-agent LLM systems with a focus on evaluation and reliability — how well agents actually perform, where they fail, and how to measure and monitor that.

I've designed and evaluated autonomous LLM agents across multiple frameworks, built observability infrastructure from scratch, and applied structured evaluation methods — ROUGE, ablation studies, precision/recall — to multi-agent NLP systems.

Currently pursuing my M.S. in AI at Northeastern University (Khoury College, ML concentration) and actively seeking an AI/ML co-op or internship in the Boston area.

Projects

What I've built

Click any project to expand
01
ActiveLLM Observability
AI Guardian
Event-driven LLM observability & cost intelligence platform
FastAPIPostgreSQLReactPython SDK
›
"Most teams building LLM apps have no idea what's happening inside them in production — which calls are expensive, which are hallucinating, which are slow. I built AI Guardian to fix that."

A Python SDK wraps any LLM call and captures latency, token usage, cost, quality scores, and hallucination risk in real time — streamed to a FastAPI + PostgreSQL backend, visualized in a React dashboard with intelligent alerting.

Completion85%
FastAPIPostgreSQLReactVitePython SDKSQLAlchemyOpenAILangChainPydantic

Real Screenshots
02
CompleteMulti-Agent NLP
Scientific Paper Analysis Agents
5-agent pipeline · +31% ROUGE over baseline · Ablation studies
HuggingFacePyTorchspaCyBART
›
"Reading a research paper properly takes hours. I wanted to see if five specialized agents — each owning one task — could do it better than one model trying to do everything."

5-agent pipeline: Summarization (BART), Citation Analysis (NetworkX graphs), Methodology Extractor (spaCy NER), Critical Analysis, and Coordinator. Evaluated with ROUGE and ablation studies — +0.31 ROUGE-1 over single-model baseline.

Completion100%

03
Complete · HonorsComputer Vision · Multi-Agent
Nexus-AI Attendance
Real-time facial recognition · 3 dashboards · Built-in AI chatbot
OpenCVdlibFlaskOpenAI API
›
"Manual attendance is error-prone and slow. I designed this as my senior thesis to show multi-agent coordination solving a real institutional problem — awarded departmental Honors."

Real-time attendance system with 3 complete dashboards (Admin, Professor, Student). Face recognition via dlib HOG + 128D embeddings, AI-powered absence handling via OpenAI API, attendance report generation with AI summary, and a built-in student chatbot.

Completion100%

04
CompleteComputer Vision · CNN
Arabic Handwriting CNN
92% test accuracy · 13,440 images · Full Arabic alphabet
PyTorchCNNComputer Vision
›
"Arabic handwriting recognition is severely underrepresented in open-source ML. I built this to address a real gap in OCR tooling — covering the full 28-character Arabic alphabet."

CNN trained from scratch on 13,440 labeled images. Custom preprocessing pipeline, data augmentation (flip, rotate, noise injection), dropout regularization, and full evaluation via confusion matrices and loss/accuracy curves. 92% test accuracy across all 28 Arabic characters.

Test Accuracy92%
PyTorchCNNData AugmentationDropoutAdam OptimizerConfusion Matrix
